expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and covers both areas: "Case focus required by benchmark: missing scenario generation for `template-save` and `report-builder loading`" and then provides dedicated sections "A) Template-save" and "B) Report-builder loading" detailing the missing scenarios/leaves.

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md repeatedly anchors to phase4a scope: header "(phase4a)", "Primary phase under test: Phase 4a", and "This deliverable is limited to Phase 4a expectations"; it frames gaps/remediation as "Phase 4a-required scenario(s)" and concludes "Output aligns with primary phase (phase4a): YES".
